'''Daroe''' was a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]]<ref name="CCG" /> who [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="CSWE Jawa" /> He<ref name="CCG" /> lived in<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|170|Daroe}}</ref> that planet's [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] [[City/Legends|town]] of<ref name="CSWE Mos Eisley">{{CSWECite|II|332-333|Mos Eisley}}</ref> [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], and was one of many [[Information broker/Legends|informants]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Having inside connections with the Empire,<ref name="CSWE" /> Daroe frequently spoke with his Imperial contact, to whom he reported the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] activities in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Daroe's equipment included an [[Ion blaster/Legends|ion blaster]]. He had [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="CCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Daroe was created for the [[2001]] ''[[Tatooine Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]. His card showed a modified image<ref name="CCG" /> of a Jawa previously pictured on another card in the [[1998]] ''[[Jabba's Palace Limited]]'' expansion of the ''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game.<ref name="CCG2">{{CCG|set=Jabba's Palace Limited|cardname=Dune Sea Sabacc (Light)}}</ref>
